headline: Healthcare IT Platforms & AI-Driven Productivity: PE's New Value Playbook

stories.title: Healthcare IT Platforms Attracting Record PE Capital as Value Creation Shifts to AI Integration
stories.summary: Healthcare IT investments keep outpacing broader healthcare PE, driven by platforms embedding AI for revenue cycle management and care delivery optimization. High multiples demand PE firms underwrite explicit operational levers from day one.
stories.takeaway: PE winning in HCIT when they can articulate clear AI productivity gains & platform consolidation synergies before deal close
stories.source: Bain Global Healthcare Private Equity Report 2026

stories.title: Consumer Healthcare Consolidation Through CRO Add-ons Amid Policy Uncertainty
stories.summary: Pharma services PE activity lagging broader healthcare as tariffs & pricing reform create uncertainty, but sponsors strategically targeting CRO site networks & manufacturing businesses insulated from policy shocks.
stories.takeaway: Smart PE move: bolt-on CROs & manufacturing over exposed pharma distribution until policy crystallizes
stories.source: Bain Global Healthcare Private Equity Report 2026

stories.title: Industrial Services Platforms Accelerating Through HVAC & Environmental Services Consolidation
stories.summary: Industrial Services (HVAC, I&ES) recording double-digit growth with strong PE interest as sponsors build platforms via add-ons. Tariff-friendly US sourcing assets attracting aggressive buyer competition.
stories.takeaway: PE targeting industrials with low tariff exposure & consolidation runway—HVAC/environmental services are lowkey the sweet spot rn

stories.title: AI-Native SaaS Becoming Table Stakes for PE Tech Portfolio Exits in Compressed Windows
stories.summary: PE firms sitting on aging 2021-2022 vintages need credible AI value creation stories to command premium exits as agentic automation reshapes software valuations. Product velocity > margin expansion now.
stories.takeaway: AI roadmap isn't optional anymore—it's literally the prerequisite for PE tech portfolio liquidity in 2026
stories.source: PwC Private Markets AI Software Valuations

watchNext.why: Investors can cherry-pick manager strategies; PE returns becoming unbundled—worth tracking how LPs & GPs adapt

watchNext.why: Aging portfolios mean sponsors less willing to wait on leadership misalignment—executive search & talent strategy fr becoming core PE ops lever
